# hrobot Provider

Manage Hetzner Robot dedicated-server infrastructure as code via the Robot webservice API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    hrobot = {
      source = "sophotechlabs/hetzner-robot"
    }
  }
}

provider "hrobot" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) Base URL of the Robot webservice. Defaults to https://robot-ws.your-server.de.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for the Robot webservice user. Can also be set via the HROBOT_PASSWORD environment variable.
- `username` (String) Robot webservice user (Robot UI -> Settings -> Web service and app settings, not the main account login). Can also be set via the HROBOT_USERNAME environment variable.
